# 1. Loyola: Base table with Grand Total
Loyola_yearly <- IPEDS |>
  filter(institution_name == "Loyola University Maryland") |>
  group_by(year) |>
  summarize(
    aian        = sum(enrollment_m_aian + enrollment_f_aian, na.rm = TRUE),
    asian       = sum(enrollment_m_asia + enrollment_f_asia, na.rm = TRUE),
    black       = sum(enrollment_m_bkaa + enrollment_f_bkaa, na.rm = TRUE),
    hispanic    = sum(enrollment_m_hisp + enrollment_f_hisp, na.rm = TRUE),
    nhpi        = sum(enrollment_m_nhpi + enrollment_f_nhpi, na.rm = TRUE),
    white       = sum(enrollment_m_whit + enrollment_f_whit, na.rm = TRUE),
    two_or_more = sum(enrollment_m_2mor + enrollment_f_2mor, na.rm = TRUE),
    unknown     = sum(enrollment_m_unkn + enrollment_f_unkn, na.rm = TRUE),
    nonresident = sum(enrollment_m_nral + enrollment_f_nral, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    `Grand Total` = aian + asian + black + hispanic + nhpi +
      white + two_or_more + unknown + nonresident
  )

# 2. Loyola: YoY % change for Grand Total
Loyola_yearly_pct <- Loyola_yearly |>
  mutate(
    pct_grand_total =
      (`Grand Total` - lag(`Grand Total`)) / lag(`Grand Total`) * 100
  )


# 1. IPEDS: Base table with Grand Total
IPEDS_yearly <- IPEDS |>
  group_by(year) |>
  summarize(
    aian        = sum(enrollment_m_aian + enrollment_f_aian, na.rm = TRUE),
    asian       = sum(enrollment_m_asia + enrollment_f_asia, na.rm = TRUE),
    black       = sum(enrollment_m_bkaa + enrollment_f_bkaa, na.rm = TRUE),
    hispanic    = sum(enrollment_m_hisp + enrollment_f_hisp, na.rm = TRUE),
    nhpi        = sum(enrollment_m_nhpi + enrollment_f_nhpi, na.rm = TRUE),
    white       = sum(enrollment_m_whit + enrollment_f_whit, na.rm = TRUE),
    two_or_more = sum(enrollment_m_2mor + enrollment_f_2mor, na.rm = TRUE),
    unknown     = sum(enrollment_m_unkn + enrollment_f_unkn, na.rm = TRUE),
    nonresident = sum(enrollment_m_nral + enrollment_f_nral, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    `Grand Total` = aian + asian + black + hispanic + nhpi +
      white + two_or_more + unknown + nonresident
  )

# 2. IPEDS: YoY % change for Grand Total
IPEDS_yearly_pct <- IPEDS_yearly |>
  mutate(
    pct_grand_total =
      (`Grand Total` - lag(`Grand Total`)) / lag(`Grand Total`) * 100
  )


# Preview names
names(IPEDS_yearly_pct)

# Basic GT table
IPEDS_yearly_pct |>
  gt() |>
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(
      aian, asian, black, hispanic, nhpi, white,
      two_or_more, unknown, nonresident, `Grand Total`
    ),
    decimals = 0
  ) |>
  fmt_percent(
    columns = pct_grand_total,
    decimals = 1,
    scale_values = FALSE
  ) |>
  cols_label(
    `Grand Total`   = "Grand Total",
    pct_grand_total = "YoY % Change (Grand Total)"
  )


# Expanded YoY % change table (all races + total)
IPEDS_yearly_pct <- IPEDS_yearly |>
  mutate(
    pct_aian        = (aian        - lag(aian))        / lag(aian)        * 100,
    pct_asian       = (asian       - lag(asian))       / lag(asian)       * 100,
    pct_black       = (black       - lag(black))       / lag(black)       * 100,
    pct_hispanic    = (hispanic    - lag(hispanic))    / lag(hispanic)    * 100,
    pct_nhpi        = (nhpi        - lag(nhpi))        / lag(nhpi)        * 100,
    pct_white       = (white       - lag(white))       / lag(white)       * 100,
    pct_two_or_more = (two_or_more - lag(two_or_more)) / lag(two_or_more) * 100,
    pct_unknown     = (unknown     - lag(unknown))     / lag(unknown)     * 100,
    pct_nonresident = (nonresident - lag(nonresident)) / lag(nonresident) * 100,
    pct_grand_total = (`Grand Total` - lag(`Grand Total`)) /
                      lag(`Grand Total`) * 100
  )

# Full GT table with YoY % for all groups
IPEDS_yearly_pct |>
  gt() |>
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(
      aian, asian, black, hispanic, nhpi, white,
      two_or_more, unknown, nonresident, `Grand Total`
    ),
    decimals = 0
  ) |>
  fmt_percent(
    columns = c(
      pct_aian, pct_asian, pct_black, pct_hispanic, pct_nhpi,
      pct_white, pct_two_or_more, pct_unknown, pct_nonresident,
      pct_grand_total
    ),
    decimals = 1,
    scale_values = FALSE
  ) |>
  cols_label(
    year            = "Year",
    aian            = "AIAN",
    asian           = "Asian",
    black           = "Black",
    hispanic        = "Hispanic",
    nhpi            = "NHPI",
    white           = "White",
    two_or_more     = "Two or More",
    unknown         = "Unknown",
    nonresident     = "Nonresident",
    `Grand Total`   = "Grand Total",
    pct_aian        = "YoY % AIAN",
    pct_asian       = "YoY % Asian",
    pct_black       = "YoY % Black",
    pct_hispanic    = "YoY % Hispanic",
    pct_nhpi        = "YoY % NHPI",
    pct_white       = "YoY % White",
    pct_two_or_more = "YoY % Two+",
    pct_unknown     = "YoY % Unknown",
    pct_nonresident = "YoY % Nonresident",
    pct_grand_total = "YoY % Grand Total"
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_text(weight = "bold", transform = "uppercase")),
    locations = cells_column_labels(everything())
  )



# 1. Base table with Grand Total (NATIONAL TOTALS)
IPEDS_yearly <- IPEDS |>
  group_by(year) |>
  summarize(
    aian        = sum(enrollment_m_aian + enrollment_f_aian, na.rm = TRUE),
    asian       = sum(enrollment_m_asia + enrollment_f_asia, na.rm = TRUE),
    black       = sum(enrollment_m_bkaa + enrollment_f_bkaa, na.rm = TRUE),
    hispanic    = sum(enrollment_m_hisp + enrollment_f_hisp, na.rm = TRUE),
    nhpi        = sum(enrollment_m_nhpi + enrollment_f_nhpi, na.rm = TRUE),
    white       = sum(enrollment_m_whit + enrollment_f_whit, na.rm = TRUE),
    two_or_more = sum(enrollment_m_2mor + enrollment_f_2mor, na.rm = TRUE),
    unknown     = sum(enrollment_m_unkn + enrollment_f_unkn, na.rm = TRUE),
    nonresident = sum(enrollment_m_nral + enrollment_f_nral, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    `Grand Total` = aian + asian + black + hispanic + nhpi +
      white + two_or_more + unknown + nonresident
  )

# 2. Add YoY % change for Grand Total
IPEDS_yearly_pct <- IPEDS_yearly |>
  mutate(
    pct_grand_total =
      (`Grand Total` - lag(`Grand Total`)) / lag(`Grand Total`) * 100
  )


# Build IPEDS_yearly
# (already done above)

# Build IPEDS_yearly_pct
# (already done above)


names(IPEDS_yearly_pct)

IPEDS_yearly_pct |>
  gt() |>
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(
      aian, asian, black, hispanic, nhpi, white,
      two_or_more, unknown, nonresident, `Grand Total`
    ),
    decimals = 0
  ) |>
  fmt_percent(
    columns = pct_grand_total,
    decimals = 1,
    scale_values = FALSE
  ) |>
  cols_label(
    `Grand Total`   = "Grand Total",
    pct_grand_total = "YoY % Change (Grand Total)"
  )


# Expanded YoY % change table (all race groups + total)
IPEDS_yearly_pct <- IPEDS_yearly |>
  mutate(
    pct_aian        = (aian        - lag(aian))        / lag(aian)        * 100,
    pct_asian       = (asian       - lag(asian))       / lag(asian)       * 100,
    pct_black       = (black       - lag(black))       / lag(black)       * 100,
    pct_hispanic    = (hispanic    - lag(hispanic))    / lag(hispanic)    * 100,
    pct_nhpi        = (nhpi        - lag(nhpi))        / lag(nhpi)        * 100,
    pct_white       = (white       - lag(white))       / lag(white)       * 100,
    pct_two_or_more = (two_or_more - lag(two_or_more)) / lag(two_or_more) * 100,
    pct_unknown     = (unknown     - lag(unknown))     / lag(unknown)     * 100,
    pct_nonresident = (nonresident - lag(nonresident)) / lag(nonresident) * 100,
    pct_grand_total = (`Grand Total` - lag(`Grand Total`)) /
                      lag(`Grand Total`) * 100
  )

IPEDS_yearly_pct |>
  gt() |>
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(
      aian, asian, black, hispanic, nhpi, white,
      two_or_more, unknown, nonresident, `Grand Total`
    ),
    decimals = 0
  ) |>
  fmt_percent(
    columns = c(
      pct_aian, pct_asian, pct_black, pct_hispanic, pct_nhpi,
      pct_white, pct_two_or_more, pct_unknown, pct_nonresident,
      pct_grand_total
    ),
    decimals = 1,
    scale_values = FALSE
  ) |>
  cols_label(
    year            = "Year",
    aian            = "AIAN",
    asian           = "Asian",
    black           = "Black",
    hispanic        = "Hispanic",
    nhpi            = "NHPI",
    white           = "White",
    two_or_more     = "Two or More",
    unknown         = "Unknown",
    nonresident     = "Nonresident",
    `Grand Total`   = "Grand Total",
    pct_aian        = "YoY % AIAN",
    pct_asian       = "YoY % Asian",
    pct_black       = "YoY % Black",
    pct_hispanic    = "YoY % Hispanic",
    pct_nhpi        = "YoY % NHPI",
    pct_white       = "YoY % White",
    pct_two_or_more = "YoY % Two+",
    pct_unknown     = "YoY % Unknown",
    pct_nonresident = "YoY % Nonresident",
    pct_grand_total = "YoY % Grand Total"
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_text(weight = "bold", transform = "uppercase")),
    locations = cells_column_labels(everything())
  )
